lore.english:
A student, Taimanin of Gosha Academy. An elite student who is a member of the student council. Born into a family that has served the Fuuma clan for generations, she always takes care of Fuuma. She claims to be 150cm tall, and she gets furious when someone claims she's actually only 149cm tall.

Out of the Beast Art users, she's a "Beast Transformer" who uses the power of the Beast to transform. Her beast type is a "Devil fish", i.e, an octopus. According to her, "Hebiko" (meaning snake woman in Japanese) is her great-grandmother's name, who was able to transform into a serpent as a Beast Transformer.

When transformed, her legs become flexible octopus tentacles. They can grow up to 30m and regrow even if they are cut off. She specializes in the Four-Wielding style, in which she wields four daggers in her hands and tentacles. However, what people are really afraid of is her ink, which is notorious for its fishy smell that doesn't go away for at least three days.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Octopus Sever[-]
skills.description:
Draws a sword from the back and slashes the enemy 3 times.
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of the 2nd skill of the ally with the highest [&ATK] other than the character by [V2:490102] turn(s).
skills.description_readable:
Draws a sword from the back and slashes the enemy 3 times.
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of the 2nd skill of the ally with the highest [&ATK] other than the character by [V2:490102] turn(s).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Spinning Octopus Slash[-]
skills.description:
Draws the sword from the back and spin around to slash the enemy 5 times.
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:490202]%)[-] [&AccDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:490202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:490202] turn(s)
If the target is an [&Agility] type, additionally inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:490203]%)[-] [&EvdDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:490203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:490203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Hebiko's Prayer[-]
skills.description: When hit by an all-target attack, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the ally with the highest [&ATK] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:490301]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:490301]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable: When hit by an all-target attack, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the ally with the highest [&ATK] by ([V3:490301]%) at a [R:490301]% chance.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_4901]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_4901]
skill_data.description:
Draws the sword from the back and slashes the enemy 3 times.
Reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of the 3rd skill of the ally with the highest [&ATK] by [V2:491102] turn(s) on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], excluding the character.
